name: Trilogy Metals Inc.
description: Trilogy Metals Inc. is a metal exploration and development company focused on exploring and developing high-grade copper-dominant projects in the Ambler Mining District of Northwest Alaska. The company's primary assets are the Upper Kobuk Mineral Projects, which include the high-grade Arctic copper-zinc-lead-gold-silver deposit and the Bornite carbonate-hosted copper deposit, both held under a 50/50 joint venture named Ambler Metals LLC with South32 Limited.
